since_last: 59% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.11%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.66% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 59% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.11%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.11%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +4.12%
cards.body: Leaders: META +4.12%, BABA +2.26%, NOW +1.99%, WDAY +1.92%, PATH +1.83%. Laggards: LRCX -3.16%, INTC -2.97%, TER -2.96%, AMAT -2.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.74% at $151.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
